profile.title: My Profile
profile.noProfileHint: Please complete your setup to view your profile.

caregiver.accepted: You've accepted the caregiver request. They can now manage your medications.
caregiver.declineConfirm: Are you sure you want to decline the request from {{name}}?
caregiver.wantsToBe: wants to be added as your caregiver to help manage your medications.

routines.title: My Routines
routines.noRoutinesHint: Set up daily routines to stay on track with your medication schedule
routines.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

language.title: Language
language.selectHint: Choose your preferred language for the app

language.title: Choose Language
language.subtitle: Please select your preferred language to continue.

step1.title: Welcome!
step1.subtitle: Let's get to know you better to personalize your reminders.

step2.title: Health Profile
step2.subtitle: Select any existing health conditions so we can better tailor your experience.

step3.title: Caregiver Details
step3.subtitle: Please provide the details of your primary caregiver who helps manage your medications.
step3.encouragement: Providing a caregiver ensures someone you trust is notified if you miss a critical dose.

validation.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.sameAsUser: Caregiver number cannot be the same as yours
validation.found: This person is on MediNest — they'll be linked as your caregiver
validation.notFound: This number is not registered on MediNest
validation.notFoundHint: You can still proceed. We'll send them an invite to join so they can track your medications.

step4.title: Preferences
step4.subtitle: Customize how you want to be reminded about your medications.
